title: Critters n' Crawlers
description: A small mod that expands the temperate & cold biomes by adding north American animals & myths!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/r6xlDXy.png)
Welcome to Critters n' Crawlers! - Formally a small quick project made by me and my friend and originally made for our private Minecraft server, this mod helps fix an issue not only of vanilla Minecraft but even the Modded community; a lack of wild animals/monsters associated with temperate and cold climates. This mod adds various different Critters but there may be a few Crawlers lurking... so watch out. THIS MOD REQUIRES [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) TO FUNCTION! - [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/xgekuqEc8E) - ### MOBS
Mob list - Elk - Coyote - Timber Wolf - White-tailed Deer - Cougar - Wolverine - Ringtail - Giant Boar - Goose - Black Bear - Beaver - Mouse - Snake - Rattlesnake - Pit Viper - Turkey - Caribou - Skunk - Marmot - Mule Deer - Wendigo - Skinwalker - Chupacabra - Squonk - Howler - Sasquatch - Wechuge And many more to come!
Showcase videos
IMPORTANT INFO - If you find any bugs report them in the [CurseForge issue tracker](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/critters-n-crawlers/issues) or on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/xgekuqEc8E). This is a fun passion project mod that doesn't have a whole team behind it. We expect there to instantly be bugs and we will try to fix them. There are a few known bugs and minor features missing currently, and you will have to forgive us for that. If there are any suggestions feel free to notify us! Other than that, happy crawling! [CURSEFORGE ALTERNATE DOWNLOAD](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/critters-n-crawlers) Special Thanks to The National Parks Service. - **Reupload by co-author endcollector, original author is Fae_Stricken_Fool**
